title.rendered: [Free Mini Webinar] 8 Ways to Grow Your Nonprofit’s Email List

content.rendered:
Date: Wednesday, December 4, 2024
Time: 1 pm ET / 10 am PT (20 minutes)
Cost: Free
Presented by: Heather Mansfield, Founder of Nonprofit Tech for Good

Email is a powerhouse for fundraising. Twenty-six percent of online donors say that email is the tool that most inspires them to give – outpacing social media, websites, and print materials. Email is also their preferred communication method to receive news updates, appeals, and thank you messages.

To maximize online fundraising success in 2025, your nonprofit must make a concerted effort to grow your email list. This free 20-minute webinar on December 4 will present eight easy ways to grow your nonprofit’s email list.

 Register Now!

Please Note: This webinar will be recorded. If you can not attend the webinar live, you will be sent a link to the recording within 24 hours after the webinar is over. Visit GoToWebinar’s Attendee System Check for information on how to join and attend this webinar.
